title: Recommendation on row height and wrapping of text on "name of column"
excerpt: monday made it to where you can change the height of items.  I wish we could change the height and wrap the text of column names.   Some of our column names are long and its important for us to see the entire column name…

posts.author: eclectusark (Kirtis McLeskey)
posts.cookedHtml: monday made it to where you can change the height of items. I wish we could change the height and wrap the text of column names. Some of our column names are long and its important for us to see the entire column name and not just make the column narrower and not be able to see the name, (unless we hold the mouse over it for description)

posts.author: jpendleton (Joann Pendleton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to turn on word wrap for Item/SubItem columns or make it automatically set to word wrap.

What are you trying to achieve

Boards would have the full item description available when they are viewed.
